name: beginnersinai-skills
description: Free Claude skills and plugins by Beginners in AI. Research-backed, tested on real businesses.

plugins.name: the-44-percent-rule
plugins.description: The 44% Rule — Find 44% more AI use cases in your business. Scans 10 core functions, scores opportunities, generates an action plan. Based on Kim, Kim & Koning (2026) field experiment of 515 startups: businesses shown how others reorganize around AI find 44% more use cases and 1.9x higher revenue.

plugins.name: brand-pulse
plugins.description: Brand Pulse — Reputation monitoring and competitor research for any brand. Scans Reddit, Hacker News, Trustpilot, G2, Capterra, Sitejabber, Product Hunt, BBB, Glassdoor, app stores, and Google. Optional Playwright mode covers X, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook via your logged-in browser. Tracks sentiment trends over time.
